title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Carriage of Goods by Sea Act, 2025. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 10th day of September, 2025, vide notification No. S.O. 4082 (E), dated 8th day of September, 2025, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
